content: Product Manager Fellowship course duration: 16 weeks (4 months)
In the Product Manager Fellowship course, Weeks 1-3: Product Discovery & Problem Framing covers: Systems thinking, KPI trees, Impact Mapping, Hypotheses creation.
Arindam Mukherjee is an instructor/mentor for Product Manager Fellowship. Background: Co-founder, ex-Flipkart.
In the Applied Generative AI Bootcamp course, Week 2: Prompt Engineering covers: Mastery of LLM interaction.
